name: designer-property-label-copy
title: fix: 表单设计器属性面板文案和标签字号调整
description: 按用户要求微调表单设计界面右侧属性编辑窗口：加宽属性表单 label-width，避免 OID(变量名) 换行；将 变量标签 改为 字段标签；将字段的 选项 属性改为 字段选项；将 标签字号=大 的前端预览字号从 15px 增大到 16px。实际实现同时串联字段实例标签样式 label_bold / label_font_size 的前端编辑、快编、预览、后端 schema/router 保存和 Word 导出映射，并记录前后端字号档位跨栈契约。
creator: decade
notes: Task record was backfilled after implementation because the initial work used the Claude Code task board rather than Trellis task.py. Claude follow-up review found that the original Trellis PRD/task.json understated the actual diff; this record now reflects the expanded full-stack label styling scope. Review fixes completed: /colors internal naming and docstring now describe field styles, quickEditProp.label_bold uses 1/0 consistently with the property panel switch, SimulatedCRFForm reuses the shared label style helper with includeBackground=false, and cross-stack contracts document frontend px vs backend pt label font-size tiers. Relevant frontend/backend guidelines and shared contracts were checked before follow-up edits. Browser/manual UI screenshot verification was not run. No commit was created because commit requires explicit user authorization.

validation.initial_targeted_tests: cd frontend && node --test tests/formFieldPresentation.test.js tests/quickEditBehavior.test.js -> 54/54 passed
validation.initial_lint_errors_only: cd frontend && npm run lint -- --quiet -> passed
validation.follow_up_backend_compile: cd /root/github/CRF-Editor/backend && python3 -m py_compile src/schemas/field.py src/routers/fields.py -> passed

tdd.red_summary: Targeted tests failed before implementation on old large字号 15px and old 属性编辑文案. Follow-up review fixes updated assertions for quickEditProp.label_bold 1/0 consistency and shared SimulatedCRFForm label helper reuse.

review_follow_up.source: Claude static code review pasted by user on 2026-06-21
resolved: Corrected Trellis PRD/task.json to reflect expanded full-stack label styling scope.
Updated /colors endpoint internal model/function naming and docstring to field style semantics while keeping the existing route path for compatibility.
Unified quick edit label_bold memory state to 1/0 and matching el-switch active/inactive values.
Recorded frontend px and backend pt label font-size tier mapping in cross-stack contracts.
Reused getFormFieldLabelPreviewStyle in SimulatedCRFForm with includeBackground=false to centralize label weight and size assembly.
Rejected label_bold=null on create, PUT, and PATCH /colors paths to keep the non-null database column contract intact.
left_as_is: SimulatedCRFForm default label bold remains bold/700 because existing backend/export compatibility treats missing label_bold as bold, and tests lock this behavior.

meta.commit_status: not committed; requires explicit user authorization
